title: fissile finding record
description: One overflow finding emitted by `fissile check` and `fissile audit` (FS-004-check-audit.1). The byte-stable fields a human and an agent both read (GOAL-003-friendly-output.1, GOAL-004-token-thrift.1).

unit.description: The unit the matched rule measures in.

limit.description: The crossed soft or hard limit in `unit`.

rule_id.description: The rule that selected the budget and message.

message_id.description: The stable ID of the configured remediation message.

exception_id.description: Present only on silenced `audit` records: the exception that accepts the file (FS-003-exceptions.5).

exception_max.description: Present only on silenced `audit` records: the maximum value the exception accepts.
